# terrible_cisco_dnac_swim_image_details_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `applicationType` (String) ApplicationType query parameter.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `createdTime` (Number) CreatedTime query parameter. Time in milliseconds (epoch format).
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `family` (String) Family query parameter.
- `headers` (String) Additional headers.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `imageIntegrityStatus` (String) ImageIntegrityStatus query parameter. ImageIntegrityStatus - FAILURE, UNKNOWN, VERIFIED.
- `imageName` (String) ImageName query parameter. Image Name.
- `imageSeries` (String) ImageSeries query parameter. Image Series.
- `imageSizeGreaterThan` (Number) ImageSizeGreaterThan query parameter. Size in bytes.
- `imageSizeLesserThan` (Number) ImageSizeLesserThan query parameter. Size in bytes.
- `imageUuid` (String) ImageUuid query parameter.
- `isCCOLatest` (Boolean) IsCCOLatest query parameter. Is latest from cisco.com.
- `isCCORecommended` (Boolean) IsCCORecommended query parameter. Is recommended from cisco.com.
- `isTaggedGolden` (Boolean) IsTaggedGolden query parameter. Is Tagged Golden.
- `limit` (Number) Limit query parameter.
- `name` (String) Name query parameter.
- `offset` (Number) Offset query parameter.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sortBy` (String) SortBy query parameter. Sort results by this field.
- `sortOrder` (String) SortOrder query parameter. Sort order - 'asc' or 'des'. Default is asc.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `version` (String) Version query parameter. Software Image Version.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
